Shop/Membership Gift
seed collection

Membership Gift

A gift membership in the Correspondent tier, good for one year. Includes a hand-lettered card from us explaining what the recipient will receive, mailed separately before the first box arrives so they know to expect it. The recipient can choose to continue or upgrade at the end of their gifted year.

$45.00

Free shipping over $40 · Ships within 3 days

You might also like

The Founders' Collection

Eight packets of our most beloved heirloom varieties, selected by Estelle and Oliver.

$42.00
The Marigold Society

A Vermont seed library, pressed-flower atelier, and quarterly journal for those who believe the old ways are worth preserving.
